title: Replace hero background with Arcos de Querétaro image

requirements.summary: Update the HeroSection component to use the newly generated Arcos de Querétaro image as the full-background hero image
acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays the Arcos de Querétaro image as a full-width, full-height background.
No previous hero background image or placeholder is visible.

file_operations.description: Update the background image styling to reference the generated Arcos de Querétaro image at frontend/public/assets/generated/arcos-queretaro-hero.dim_1920x1080.png. Replace any existing background image URL or inline style with the new asset path. Ensure the image displays as a full-width, full-height background with appropriate object-fit and positioning to maintain visual quality across all viewport sizes.
